race.comment: GAME OF PHONES (5) finds it hard to win. Hit the board with a minor placing last time when third (22.99) at this track. Can measure up this time. OUR BOY BILLY (1) drew a squeeze box and was game in defeat when a close second, a long neck from the winner Tat Buddy (22.87) at this track. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings six times from 12 attempts. Expected to be in this for a long way. PAW ULA (6) took advantage of a low draw last start with an all-the-way win (22.87) at Warrnambool in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win over 390m. Sure to be thereabouts. BOROUGH BOUND (2) was prominent throughout when successful last start. Right in the mix.
